title: Cyphostemma alnifolium

intro: Cyphostemma alnifolium, commonly known as the 'Mountain Grape', is a succulent plant species belonging to the grape family, Vitaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including diabetes, hypertension, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Cyphostemma alnifolium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In herbal medicine, Cyphostemma alnifolium is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in the manufacture of traditional herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions.
